articles.title: Benchmarks are becoming circular
articles.summary:
A benchmark is supposed to be a yardstick. If the yardstick is made of the same material as the object being measured, the measurement is meaningless.

We are seeing this happen in agentic coding. The...

articles.title: Task completion is not collaboration. Mental models are.
articles.summary:

articles.title: Provenance is moving from metadata to behavior
articles.summary:
